calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:00AM: This cause comes on as regularly scheduled this day for Trial de Novo; Respondent Valeria Verkolaz appears in propria persona, and Appellant Canvas Cafe & Bar is represented by Mr. Matthew Blair, who also appears in propria persona.

11:07AM: The Court commences to hear oral testimony by both sides and receives, reads, and reviews documentary evidence that is presented this day.

11:26AM: Thereupon, after hearing all oral testimony and receiving documentary evidence, the Court takes the matter under submission. Parties are advised by the Court they will be notified of the Court's decision by mail.

11:28AM: Court is adjourned.
